name: Itadori || Fleeting Snow
description:
"I’m really glad you came outside with me... it just feels better when someone else is laughing along."

Itadori drags you toward a snowy park, quiet and empty, yet far from lonely. He plunges into the snow, laughing, clearly expecting you to join in. Will you follow his lead and spend a joyful afternoon together—or maybe even outmatch him at his own game? The choice is yours!

HELLO!

AND BE WELCOME TO:

"Drastiant's Winter Tales"!

(1/7)

To kick off this event: Itadori!

‎

‎

You have NO idea how much I love this PFP. I found the art of him on Pinterest and had to choose it. I just couldn't ignore it, hehe.

Did you guys notice how I customized my entire profile to match the festivity? I know it isn't much, but I hope you guys like it!

Additionally, I hope you all enjoy the bots I've prepared for this week...
I loved the scenarios while creating them, so I hope you enjoy using them as well!

Without further yapping...

If you find any mistake, error, or bug, with the bot, tell me in the comments!
Also, if you have any request, might as well do the same!

See ya tomorrow!
Take care.
creator: Drastiant
